tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent retraces to ~$93 (Apr 15, est.) after Day 44 $94.79 confirmed (CNBC) - the blockade-spike from $102 has fully unwound as Trump hints at second-round Islamabad talks within two days. WTI $90.92 confirmed (TradingEconomics Apr 15). Trim Brent long from high to medium conviction; PTTEP and Medco upside compressed but remain well above $65 pre-shock base. Retain Sapura options overlay on tail scenario (32%). Apr 21 ceasefire expiry is the binary catalyst - a talks framework would drive Brent toward $85; a lapse re-opens $130+ stress. Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Blockade de-risk on fresh talks signal (Apr 14-15) unwinds partial energy overweight: Brent ~$93, ASEAN Energy Equities -2.6%; ASEAN Banks +1.7% as risk-off reverses. iTraxx Asia IG tightens to ~180bp (-9bp); ASEAN HY ~555bp (-20bp). Reduce full energy long to two-thirds size; begin trimming bank underweight as iTraxx approaches 170bp re-add threshold. Tail probability 32%. Apr 21 ceasefire expiry and second-round Islamabad talks are the binary catalyst set - prepare rotation plan in both directions.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Take Partial Profit on Talks Signal
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP strengthens to ~58.20 (est. Apr 15) as Brent retraces to ~$93 and Trump signals new talks. Take half-profit on short PHP position; retain options 61.00 strike given 32% tail probability (ceasefire expiry Apr 21). Philippines bilateral Hormuz routing in place; non-Iranian tanker transit confirmed (3 vessels Apr 14). Full re-entry trigger: talks collapse or Apr 21 ceasefire lapse without framework. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Trim on Brent Retrace
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR strengthens to ~16,800 (est. Apr 15, -0.7%) and Indonesia 10Y eases to ~7.18% as Brent drops below $95. ICP overshoot narrows to ~$23/bbl. Trim short IDR to half-size; retain USD Call/IDR Put 17,500 strike option as cheap tail hedge ahead of Apr 21 ceasefire expiry. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,400 (Brent sub-$85). Netanyahu-Lebanon track + second Islamabad round are the twin derisking catalysts. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection - Trim at 180bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG tightens to ~180bp (-9bp Apr 15) and ASEAN HY to ~555bp (-20bp) as talks resumption expectations bring risk premium lower. Trim CDS protection from full to two-thirds; retain full Sapura / Hyflux paper short on 32% tail probability. Re-add trigger at 195bp (blockade escalation) or Apr 21 ceasefire lapse. Netanyahu-Lebanon deal + second Islamabad round could tighten spreads 15-25bp further, below 170bp re-add line.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Scale Back on Talks Signal
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM eases to ~$19.40 (Apr 14 $19.49 confirmed Investing.com); TTF €43.00 (Apr 14 €42.95 confirmed, -7.46% OilPriceAPI). Scale back JKM long to half-size as blockade-driven Asia scarcity premium compresses with talks signal. Ras Laffan full restart unlikely before late Aug 2026 (The National) - structural Asia tightness remains. Tail target $24-28 JKM back on table only if Apr 21 ceasefire lapses without framework. Stop at confirmed formal Hormuz reopening.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG tightens to ~180bp and ASEAN HY to ~555bp on talks-resumption signal (Apr 15). Refinancing window is re-opening but remains above pre-shock levels. Do not execute full unsecured issuance yet; begin roadshow preparation and targeted private placements to be ready for sub-170bp print. Second Islamabad round and Apr 21 ceasefire expiry are the binary catalysts.

Brent retrace to ~$93 and THB strengthening to ~33.50 improve the THB prefunding window: Thailand 10Y eases to ~2.24%. PTTEP upstream EBITDA remains well above pre-shock base. Execute H2 2026 USD prefunding now; second Islamabad round could compress spreads further but Apr 21 ceasefire expiry is a binary risk - do not wait. Gulf JV sanctions-compliance review remains urgent given active blockade.

Talks-resumption signal opens a clearer execution window: iTraxx Asia IG at ~180bp and USD/SGD at ~1.2830. Brent at ~$93 and JKM at ~$19.40 reduce working capital pressure vs blockade peak. Execute revolving-credit expansion now before Apr 21 ceasefire expiry; framework deal would tighten spreads further but lapse would re-widen them. Maintain USD hedging.

ASEAN HY tightens to ~555bp on fresh talks signal; Brent at ~$93 eases desalination power cost trajectory. Hyflux's utility stress remains structural. Use the spread-tightening window through Apr 21 ceasefire expiry to execute private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring; do not treat the talks signal as full resolution. Tail risk 32%.
